Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class HealthRecord.Entry

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord.Entry
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
HealthRecord.Allergy, HealthRecord.Device, HealthRecord.Encounter, HealthRecord.EntryWithReasons, HealthRecord.ImagingStudy, HealthRecord.Immunization, HealthRecord.Observation, HealthRecord.Report, HealthRecord.Supply
Enclosing class:
HealthRecord
public class HealthRecord.Entry extends Object implements Serializable
All things within a HealthRecord are instances of Entry. For example, Observations, Reports, Medications, etc. All Entries have a name, start and stop times, a type, and a list of associated codes.
See Also:

    • Entry

      public Entry(long start, String type)
      Constructor for Entry.

      start - the start time of the entry

  • Method Details

    • getCost

      public BigDecimal getCost()
      Returns the base cost of the entry.
      Returns:
      the cost of the entry

    • containsCode

      public boolean containsCode(String code, String system)
      Determines if the given entry contains the provided code in its list of codes.
      Parameters:
      code - clinical term
      system - system for the code
      Returns:
      true if the code is there

    • mergeCodeList

      public void mergeCodeList(List<HealthRecord.Code> otherCodes)
      Merges the passed in code list into the existing list of codes for this entry. If a code in otherCodes already exists in this.codes, it is skipped, since it already exists in the Entry.
      Parameters:
      otherCodes - codes to add to this entry

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Converts the entry to a String.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      string representation of the entry
